infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: LingoStickers uses your camera to scan objects and create vocabulary stickers.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: LingoStickers can tag where this memory happened, turning your collection into a map of your language journey. This is entirely optional.

plugins.cameraPermission: LingoStickers uses your camera to scan objects and create vocabulary stickers.

plugins.savePhotosPermission: LingoStickers saves your stickers to your photo library so you can share them as chat stickers.

plugins.photosPermission: LingoStickers needs access to your photo library so you can pick a picture to turn into a sticker.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: LingoStickers can tag where this memory happened, turning your collection into a map of your language journey. This is entirely optional.
